name: Bank of America Financial Center
description_short: In Philadelphia, PA, the Bank of America Financial Center at 1600 JFK Blvd offers weekday banking services, 9AM-4PM.
description_long:
Located at 1600 John F Kennedy Boulevard, Suite 101, the Bank of America Financial Center in Philadelphia, PA serves customers during weekday business hours. The branch operates Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM, and is closed on weekends. This Center City location provides an in-person banking hub for Philadelphia residents and professionals working in the downtown area.

At this Philadelphia branch, customers can address banking needs including account services, loan applications, and wealth management consultations. For inquiries specific to this Philadelphia, PA location, call +1 215-561-5014. The dedicated staff can help schedule appointments and discuss services tailored to your financial situation.

Residents of Philadelphia should plan visits during the weekday window to access this Bank of America Financial Center. Bring a government-issued ID and any supporting documents needed for your banking transaction. The JFK Boulevard location offers convenient downtown access for anyone managing finances across Philadelphia.
address: 1600 John F Kennedy Blvd STE 101, Philadelphia, PA 19103

company_info.headquarters: 1600 John F Kennedy Blvd STE 101, Philadelphia, PA 19103

pros: Full-service financial center with in-person specialist consultations available by appointment
Walk-up and cardless ATM with multilingual interface (7 languages: English, Spanish, Chinese, Korean, French, Russian, Portuguese)
Notary services available on-site for document certification
Commercial deposit services accepted for business customers
Mobile Banking app with mobile check deposit, biometric authentication, and customizable alerts
Extended Saturday hours (9 AM-2 PM) for weekend banking access
Ability to cash non-customer checks at the location
cons: Limited weekday hours (closes at 4 PM) may not accommodate working professionals
ATM hours vary at this location, creating uncertainty about after-hours access
Subject to standard Bank of America fee structure, which may include monthly maintenance fees and out-of-network ATM surcharges
As a large corporation, less personalized service compared to community banks or credit unions
No drive-thru services mentioned at this specific location, limiting convenience for some customers
best_for: Philadelphia residents and businesses already using Bank of America who prefer in-person specialist consultations
Small business owners needing commercial deposit services and business banking specialists
Multilingual customers seeking banking services with support in non-English languages
Customers comfortable with appointment-based banking who value personalized financial planning guidance
diagnosis: This Bank of America branch is best suited for Philadelphia residents and business customers already established with the bank who value in-person specialist consultations and prefer convenience of a full-service location with extended Saturday hours. The primary caveat is that as a large national bank, fees and service limitations are governed by Bank of America's corporate policies, and customers seeking specialized wealth management may need higher account tiers to access premium services.
services: In-person financial specialist consultations by appointment
Walk-up ATM with cardless and tap-to-pay capabilities
Mobile check deposit via Bank of America Mobile Banking app
Personal account management and advisory services
Wealth management and financial planning services
meta_description: Bank of America Financial Center at 1600 JFK Blvd, Philadelphia, PA. Weekday banking services, 9AM-4PM Mon-Fri.
